description: Measure return on investment for training programs by connecting cost inputs to compliance and business outcomes using causal attribution.

question_patterns: what's the ROI of our training program

transformations: pair cost metrics with outcome metrics
compute cost_per_unit (cost per completion, cost per certification)
use causal attribution to allocate shared costs

cce_config.uses: ROI-oriented recommendations — attribute outcome improvements to specific training investments via causal paths

recommender_instructions.metric_selection_bias: prefer metrics that can be paired as cost+outcome; deprioritize metrics that are neither cost-related nor outcome-related
recommender_instructions.output_guidance: each recommended metric should be tagged as cost_input or outcome_metric; include pairing suggestions (which cost metric pairs with which outcome); include roi_computation_formula where possible
recommender_instructions.causal_usage: use causal edges to attribute outcome changes to specific cost inputs — this is the core of ROI attribution

penalty_rules: penalize metrics that cannot be classified as cost_input or outcome_metric (-0.15)
penalize metrics with no unit economics (cannot compute cost_per_unit) (-0.08)
boost_rules: boost metrics with clear cost_input → outcome causal path (+0.10)
boost cost metrics with per-learner granularity (+0.08)
boost outcome metrics with demonstrated training attribution (+0.05)
